message:
Merge PR #2704: Fix Deacon phantom alert storm for nuked polecats

Skip agents with agent_state=nuked in GUPP violation and orphaned work
checks. Nuked polecats were generating ~7 false alerts per 3-min cycle
(~140 unnecessary Dolt commits/hour). Also removes deprecated --flat
flag from bd list calls, adds RoleDog identity case, and fixes sling
bead lookup to use town root for correct prefix routing.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2704
Author: floristDev

Co-authored-by: floristDev <patrick@zimny.dev>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -155,7 +155,7 @@ func ScanStaleHooks(townRoot string, cfg *StaleHookConfig) (*StaleHookScanResult
 
 // listHookedBeads returns all beads with status=hooked.
 func listHookedBeads(townRoot string) ([]*HookedBead, error) {
-	cmd := exec.Command("bd", "list", "--status=hooked", "--json", "--flat", "--limit=0")
+	cmd := exec.Command("bd", "list", "--status=hooked", "--json", "--limit=0")
 	cmd.Dir = townRoot
 
 	output, err := cmd.Output()
